title: Hydrated and Optimized
description: Performance modpack featuring optimizations, utility, QoL and aesthetic improvements.
body:
## Hydrated 💧 **Utility** and **QoL** mods made for convenience and intergration with minecraft servers such as *MCCI*. Full support for OptiFine features such as shaders and resourcepacks. Designed with configurability and compatibility in mind. ## Optimized ⚡ HaO includes several optimization mods seamlessly working to maximize framerate with less usage. Additionally containing mods to boost loading speeds and performance in multiplayer settings, coupled with utility and intergrations from before!
